description_long: This is a portable fire extinguisher with a cylindrical red metal body and a black top assembly. The extinguisher features a prominent yellow instruction label with red and black text and pictograms, wrapped around the upper portion of the cylinder. The top is fitted with a brown lever handle and a black discharge lever, as well as a visible metal safety pin and a green cap near the valve. The surface of the cylinder shows some wear and scuff marks, indicating use or age. The extinguisher lacks a visible hose or nozzle attachment, and no mounting bracket is present.
description: A red cylindrical fire extinguisher with a yellow instruction label, brown handle, and visible safety pin, showing signs of wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow instruction label, brown handle, and black lever assembly.
description_view_1: Angled rear-left view highlighting the side of the label, safety pin, and green cap near the valve.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain red cylinder with no label, handle and lever assembly visible at the top.
description_view_3: Angled rear-right view showing the edge of the label, safety pin, and green cap, with more of the plain red surface visible.
attribute_label_or_signage: A large yellow rectangular label with red and black text and pictograms is present on the front upper portion of the cylinder.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A silver metal safety pin is visible at the top near the handle.
